name: GradleAuthenticate
description: Authenticate Gradle builds against Azure Artifacts feeds using Workload Identity Federation or an access token.
author: Microsoft Corporation

inputs.name: buildFiles
inputs.label: Build files
inputs.helpMarkDown: Newline-separated list of Gradle build files to scan for Azure Artifacts repository URLs. Should include settings.gradle for plugin version discovery.

inputs.name: repositoryUrl
inputs.label: Repository URL(s)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Newline-separated list of explicit Azure Artifacts repository URLs to authenticate, in addition to any discovered from build files. Supports both dependency feeds and plugin repositories.

inputs.name: adoServiceConnection
inputs.label: Service connection
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps service connection for Workload Identity Federation (WIF). If omitted, the task uses the SYSTEM_ACCESSTOKEN or ARTIFACTS_GRADLE_AUTH_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variable for authentication.

inputs.name: pluginToolVersion
inputs.label: Plugin tool version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Override the credential provider plugin version used for the local JAR layout and init script. Use when settings.gradle does not declare the plugin or when version resolution fails.

inputs.name: gradleUserHome
inputs.label: Gradle user home
inputs.helpMarkDown: Override the Gradle user home directory. Defaults to ~/.gradle. The init script is written to <gradleUserHome>/init.d/.

messages.Error_CouldNotDetermineVersion: Could not determine the credential provider plugin version. Either declare the plugin in settings.gradle and include it in buildFiles, or set the pluginToolVersion input.
messages.Error_CouldNotResolveCiJar: Could not resolve the credential provider JAR.
messages.Error_NoBuildFilesOrRepoUrls: At least one of buildFiles or repositoryUrl must be provided. buildFiles should list Gradle build files containing Azure Artifacts repository URLs. repositoryUrl should be an explicit Azure Artifacts repository URL.
messages.Error_NoCiJarFound: No credential provider JAR found. Ensure GRADLE_CREDPROVIDER_HOME is set (provided automatically on Microsoft-hosted agents) or that the task package includes a bundled credential provider JAR.
messages.Info_AutoDiscoveredBuildFiles: No buildFiles input provided; auto-discovered Gradle files in working directory: %s
messages.Info_CiJarFromHome: Using credential provider JAR from GRADLE_CREDPROVIDER_HOME: %s
messages.Info_DynamicVersionDetected: Dynamic plugin version "%s" detected; will resolve via maven-metadata.xml
messages.Info_NoFeedsNothingToConfigure: No Azure Artifacts feeds found. Nothing to configure.
messages.Info_PluginVersionBundled: No plugin version in build files; using bundled JAR version: %s
messages.Info_SuccessResult: GradleAuthenticate configured %s feed(s) with plugin version(s) %s
messages.Warning_CorruptAuthConfig: Existing auth config at %s is corrupt and will be overwritten.
messages.Warning_CouldNotDetermineResourceTenant: Could not determine resource tenant for %s
messages.Warning_MissingSystemVariable: System variable %s is not set; WIF authentication may not work.
messages.Warning_NoFeedsFound: No Azure Artifacts feed URLs (pkgs.dev.azure.com) found in the provided build files or repository URLs.
messages.Warning_NoServiceConnection: No service connection configured. The credential provider will use the SYSTEM_ACCESSTOKEN or ARTIFACTS_GRADLE_AUTH_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variable for authentication. Set one of these variables in your pipeline or provide a service connection for Workload Identity Federation.
messages.Warning_RepositoryUrlNotAzureArtifacts: The provided repositoryUrl (%s) does not appear to be an Azure Artifacts URL (expected pkgs.dev.azure.com). Authentication may not work correctly.
